推荐场景: 远程会议结尾｜确认 action items
60秒任务: 「行动项确认」：背景/优先级/风险/行动项；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 优先级｜风险｜资源｜时间线｜行动项｜责任分配
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let’s confirm the action items.（确认行动项）
Who is responsible for ___?（确认责任人）
What’s the deadline for this?（确认截止时间）
I’ll take ownership of ___.（承担任务）
Can you send the update by ___?（请求更新）
Let’s write that in the tracker.（记录到工具）
Just to confirm, you’ll handle ___, right?（复述确认）
What’s the next step after that?（确认下一步）
Do we need a follow-up meeting?（安排跟进）
I’ll summarize the decisions in writing.（书面总结）
Please flag any blockers early.（提前标记阻碍）
We should add a clear owner.（补负责人）
Can we agree on the due date?（确认日期）
I’ll check back on ___.（后续检查）
That’s my understanding; did I miss anything?（校准理解）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: action item, owner, deadline, update, tracker, follow-up, decision, blocker
Verbs: confirm, assign, own, handle, send, summarize, flag, follow up
Adjectives / Status: clear, pending, agreed, overdue, assigned, written
Time / Place: by Friday, tomorrow, after the call, in the tracker, in writing
Chunks: take ownership, due date, next step, check back, did I miss anything
